title: software.chart Facet
description: Demanded by the K8s/Helm collector (ADR-0081) and the software-advisory check (ADR-0080): the CHART form of the deliverable-software dimension, carried by an `application` Entity (a deployed deliverable instance). Same dimension as software.package/software.container, different form — it is a `charts` component list sharing the {name, version, origin, deliveryForm} software-component shape, so the ONE form-agnostic CheckSoftwareAdvisories pass covers charts too: a vulnerable chart version surfaces a patch/advisory Finding for free. A projection (§1.2) of the Helm release, observed by the collector; never authored. Single §2.1 write-owner.

charts.description: The chart(s) this application was deployed from (usually one; a list for subcharts/dependencies).

appVersion.description: The application version the chart deploys, when distinct.

origin.description: Development lineage — OPEN: internal | external | vendor.

deliveryForm.description: OPEN form; this facet is the `chart` form.
